title: Paying for study and training
content:
## Paying for study and training , Te utu i ngā mahi ako me te whakangungu
Find out study and training costs and ways you can pay.
- Featured guide Ways to pay for study and training Ngā āhua utu i te ako me te whakangungu How will study or training affect your bank balance? Before you sign up to a programme, be clear about what it will cost – or what you’ll earn – and how you can pay for everything.

## Ways to pay for study and training

## Ngā āhua utu i te ako me te whakangungu
How will study or training affect your bank balance? Before you sign up to a programme, be clear about what it will cost – or what you’ll earn – and how you can pay for everything.
- Guide About Fees Free Mō te Ako Kore Utu Thinking about doing tertiary education? You may be eligible for Fees Free.
Thinking about doing tertiary education? You may be eligible for Fees Free.
